mapper.sql: select o.weigh_id, o.weigh_no, o.user_id, o.venue_id, o.weight_grams, o.price_cents, o.is_member, o.amount_cents, o.status, o.pay_trade_no, o.paid_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, u.nickname, v.name as venue_name from fish_weigh_order o left join fish_user u on o.user_id = u.user_id left join fish_venue v on o.venue_id = v.venue_id
mapper.insert: insert into fish_weigh_order (weigh_no, user_id, venue_id, weight_grams, price_cents, is_member, amount_cents, status, create_time) values (#{weighNo}, #{userId}, #{venueId}, #{weightGrams}, #{priceCents}, #{isMember}, #{amountCents}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_weigh_order set status = #{newStatus}, update_time = sysdate() where weigh_id = #{fishWeighId} and status = #{expectedStatus}
